top_signals.title: UK Eases Russian Fuel Sanctions to Safeguard Diesel and Jet Supply
top_signals.summary: Britain will allow imports of diesel and jet fuel refined abroad from Russian crude under a sanctions carve-out, watering down restrictions to help ensure supply at home as prices soar due to the conflict in the Middle East.While Britain's support for Ukraine remains steadfast…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Xi warns of ‘law of the jungle’ at Putin summit
top_signals.summary: Russian and Chinese leaders promote energy and technology co-operation days after Donald Trump’s Beijing visit
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Veteran UBS Analyst Says AI Is Helping End China Property Slump
top_signals.summary: UBS Group AG real estate analyst John Lam, a market veteran who spotted problems at China Evergrande Group before his peers, has joined a chorus of observers declaring that China’s yearslong property downturn is finally losing steam.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Trade Tariff: duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas
top_signals.summary: Temporary duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas (ATQs) for importing goods into the UK.

top_signals.title: US Long Bond Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Concern - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Long Bond Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
